title: Security: Use-after-Free in InstallUpdateCallback
description_snippet:
Chrome version: 101.0.4951

[0] The `browser_context_` is posted to a separate sequence in function `UpdateDataProvider::RunInstallCallback`

https://source.chromium.org/chromium/chromium/src/+/main:extensions/browser/updater/update_data_provider.cc;drc=06b7fdb48dea3de43ab2b3fc996bdc3e09abbd9a
